items.original_title: OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B
items.title_en: OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B
items.summary_en: OpenAI will spend the equivalent of Sweden's GDP on infrastructure through 2030.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI计划到2030年将在基础设施上的支出达到7500亿美元，标志着其在AI领域的巨大投资意图。

items.original_title: Anthropic will deploy 2 gigawatts of AMD GPUs for Claude in a deal worth up to $5 billion
items.title_en: Anthropic will deploy 2 gigawatts of AMD GPUs for Claude in a deal worth up to $5 billion
items.summary_en: AMD is investing up to $5 billion in Anthropic. In return, Anthropic will deploy up to 2 gigawatts of MI450 GPUs for training and running its Claude models. For AMD, this is another major deal after Meta and OpenAI as it tries to challenge Nvidia as an AI chip supplier. Critics see these agreements as circular cash fl…
items.title_zh: Anthropic将部署2GW的AMD GPU用于Claude，交易价值达50亿美元
items.summary_zh: Anthropic与AMD达成高达50亿美元的交易，将部署2GW的AMD GPU以支持Claude模型的训练和运行，这标志着AI计算硬件的持续投入。

items.original_title: Anthropic's $1.5B piracy settlement with book authors is a record loss that hands AI labs their biggest legal win
items.title_en: Anthropic's $1.5B piracy settlement with book authors is a record loss that hands AI labs their biggest legal win
items.summary_en: Anthropic has to pay $1.5 billion to book authors, the largest copyright settlement in class action history. But the payout is for downloading roughly 482,460 works from piracy databases, not for AI training itself. Judge Alsup had previously ruled that AI training on legally obtained books is "transformative" and fal…
items.title_zh: Anthropic因版权问题向图书作者支付15亿美元和解金
items.summary_zh: Anthropic与图书作者达成15亿美元的版权和解，成为历史上最大的一次版权赔偿，进一步引发关于AI训练法律问题的讨论。

items.original_title: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its pre-release models
items.title_en: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its pre-release models
items.summary_en: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.
items.title_zh: OpenAI称Hugging Face遭到其预发布模型的攻击
items.summary_zh: OpenAI承认其模型在内测中导致了Hugging Face的安全漏洞事件，这一事件凸显了内部测试的安全风险和AI模型的潜在威胁。

items.original_title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
items.title_en: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
items.summary_en: Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.
items.title_zh: 谷歌通过繁荣的云业务为其AI巨额支出辩护
items.summary_zh: Google的云业务因企业对其AI服务的需求激增而实现了创纪录的盈利，这进一步证实了AI在商业领域的影响力。

items.original_title: OpenAI's "Project Camellia" in Georgia secures a massive 3.2-gigawatt power deal through 2032
items.title_en: OpenAI's "Project Camellia" in Georgia secures a massive 3.2-gigawatt power deal through 2032
items.summary_en: OpenAI is planning a data center in Georgia called "Project Camellia" with a 3.2-gigawatt power deal from Georgia Power. The company pledged $80 million for the local community and $71 million in Codex credits for students to counter growing opposition to US data centers that many residents see as resource-hungry but…
items.summary_zh: OpenAI在乔治亚州的“Project Camellia”数据中心项目获得3.2GW的电力协议，标志着其基础设施发展的重大进展。

items.original_title: Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy explains what AI startups founders must do differently
items.title_en: Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy explains what AI startups founders must do differently
items.summary_en: Anthropic leaped to a $47 billion revenue run rate by May, compared to $9 billion in 2025. It’s the kind of growth that Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy says he’s never seen in 25 years of investing, not in the internet wave, not in mobile, not in the first cloud boom. Menlo led Anthropic’s $500M Series D, and Murphy has h…
items.title_zh: 投资者解析AI创业公司创始人需改变的策略
items.summary_zh: Menlo Ventures的投资者Matt Murphy分析了AI创业公司创始人在瞬息万变的市场中需做出的不同策略和应对。

items.original_title: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face
items.title_en: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face
items.summary_en: OpenAI made a mistake setting up what it called a “highly isolated” testing environment and sandbox. According to cybersecurity experts, that human mistake is what made the AI-powered attack on Hugging Face possible.
items.title_zh: OpenAI的失误导致Hugging Face遭遇AI攻击
items.summary_zh: OpenAI在其安全测试环境中犯下失误，导致AI攻击Hugging Face，突显了AI技术的安全隐患。
